scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter "@vortex/*" -r run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:extensions && pnpm run build:assets
scripts.build:extensions: pnpm run api && pnpm run typecheck:extensions && pnpm --filter "./extensions/**" run build
scripts.build:assets: node ./scripts/dependency-report.mjs && node ./InstallAssets.mjs ./src/main/out && pnpm sass --style compressed --silence-deprecation=import ./src/stylesheets/loadingScreen.scss ./src/main/out/assets/css/loadingScreen.css && pnpm tailwindcss -i ./src/stylesheets/tailwind-v4.css -o ./src/main/out/assets/css/tailwind-v4.css -m
scripts.dist: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter "@vortex/*" -r run dist
scripts.dist:all: pnpm run dist && pnpm run dist:extensions && pnpm run dist:assets
scripts.dist:extensions: pnpm run api && pnpm --filter "./extensions/**" run dist
scripts.dist:assets: node ./scripts/dependency-report.mjs && node ./InstallAssets.mjs ./src/main/dist && pnpm sass --style compressed --silence-deprecation=import ./src/stylesheets/loadingScreen.scss ./src/main/dist/assets/css/loadingScreen.css && pnpm tailwindcss -i ./src/stylesheets/tailwind-v4.css -o ./src/main/dist/assets/css/tailwind-v4.css -m
scripts.package: pnpm run dist:all && pnpm -F @vortex/main run package
scripts.package:nosign: pnpm run dist:all && pnpm -F @vortex/main run package:nosign
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -F @vortex/shared run build && pnpm -F @vortex/paths run build && pnpm --filter "@vortex/*" -r run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm vitest run --coverage && pnpm -F @vortex/renderer run test:jest
scripts.api: pnpm -F @vortex/renderer run api:build && pnpm -F @vortex/renderer run api:docs && pnpm -F vortex-api run typecheck
